text:
- Update security/gpgme to version 1.1.8
- Remove an always true condition and remaining 4.x support
- Install PORTDOCS
- Sort pkg-plist
- Take maintainership

How-To-Repeat: - Unzip diff "gzip -d 2009-01-28-gpgme.diff.gz"
- Apply diff
- Remove files/patch-assuan-assuan-defs.h (Unneeded 4.x patch)
- Remove files/patch-gpgme-Makefile.in
